prompt: First-person perspective (POV) holding a modern sleek smartphone, the screen displays a glowing teal and green holographic nutrition breakdown interface with bars and numbers. In the background, a slightly blurred premium cafe table with a gourmet burger and a paper receipt. Subtle cyberpunk aesthetic, neon teal and blue light trails, soft cinematic lighting, warm wood textures, photorealistic, 8k resolution, highly detailed, vertical composition 4:5.
negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, qr code, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy environment, low resolution, cartoon, 3d render, illustration, signature, frame, distorted screen text.
notes: Used a POV (first-person) angle to make the user feel like they are the one 'taking the photo' as per the post text.
Integrated the teal/green neon glow from the references into a 'holographic nutrition interface' on the phone screen.
Balanced the 'cyberpunk' feel with 'premium lifestyle' by using warm wood and high-quality food textures as a base.
Ensured no brand logos or actual readable text appear to keep the image clean for social media overlays.
